idea-plugin.name: IntelliJDeodorant
idea-plugin.description:
Detects code smells in Java code and recommends appropriate refactorings to resolve them.

Supports following code smells:

  • Feature Envy - resolved by Move Method refactorings
  • Long Method - resolved by Extract Method refactorings
  • Type Checking - resolved by Replace Conditional with Polymorphism refactorings
  • State Checking - resolved by Replace Type code with State/Strategy refactorings
  • God Class - resolved by Extract Class refactorings

Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA 2023.2 through 2025.2+


Based on tsantalis/JDeodorant Eclipse plugin.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2025.2-COMPATIBLE-1.0

  • Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.4 (Build 252)
  • Modernized threading APIs (ReadAction, WriteAction, invokeLater)
  • Improved thread safety and stability
  • Ready for bachelor's thesis code smell implementations

2020.3-MODERNIZED-1.0

  • Modernize deprecated IntelliJ Platform APIs
  • Replace ApplicationManager.runReadAction() with ReadAction.run()
  • Replace ApplicationManager.runReadAction(Computable) with ReadAction.compute()
  • Replace invokeAndWait() with invokeLater() for UI thread safety

2020.3-1.0

  • Add compatibility with IDEA 2020.3

2020.1-1.1

  • Make it possible to choose a search scope to detect code smells
  • Redesign the panel
  • Minor bug fixes

2020.1-1.2

  • Add preview for Extract Class refactoring
  • Minor bug fixes
